decisions.decision: sheet_row_id (1-based row number) as upsert key, not ID_Lead
decisions.rationale: ID_Lead is empty for all 730 live rows; row position is the only stable unique identifier

decisions.decision: QUALIFIED_STATUS = '✅ Aprobado - Respuesta enviada' exact emoji literal
decisions.rationale: Confirmed from live sheet; this string drives calificados count

decisions.decision: rapidfuzz WRatio threshold 80 for talent name matching
decisions.rationale: Resolves all 8 talent name variants without an alias dict; confirmed on live data
Source-isolated guard prevents cross-source collision; pipedrive guard is MISSING source filter (CR-01 — fix pending)
